parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ received: true, tender_id: $json.tender_id, bidder_count: $json.bidder_ids.length, status: 'processing' }) }}

nodes.name: Fetch Confirmed Criteria
nodes.notes: Fetches only status=confirmed criteria — WF-3 must not run on unreviewed criteria. FastAPI should 400 if any criteria are still pending_review.

nodes.name: Build Bidder × Criterion Matrix
nodes.notes: Outputs one item per bidder×criterion pair. 5 bidders × 5 criteria = 25 items. Each item carries everything needed for the extraction loop.

nodes.name: Split In Batches
nodes.notes: Batch size 1 = sequential LLM calls. Prevents overwhelming the local model runner. For demo with few pairs, this is fine. Increase to 2-3 only if model runner has GPU.

nodes.name: Embed Criterion Text
nodes.notes: Uses embedding_query = name + description + source_text combined. Richer query = better Qdrant retrieval than description alone.

nodes.name: Attach Embedding to Pair
nodes.notes: Merges the 768-dim vector back onto the pair object. The HTTP Request node only returns the embedding response, so we manually merge with the pair context.

nodes.name: Search Qdrant
nodes.notes: score_threshold: 0.3 filters very irrelevant chunks. bidder_id filter is case-sensitive — must match exactly what was upserted in WF-1. Returns top-5 chunks.

nodes.name: Build Extraction Prompt
nodes.notes: Formats top-5 chunks as numbered context blocks. Includes relevance scores so the LLM can weight them. Sets no_chunks_found flag for the IF node.

nodes.name: Any Chunks Found?
nodes.notes: If Qdrant returned nothing, skip the LLM call entirely. Set evidence as not_found with reason. This avoids wasting a 30s LLM call on an empty prompt.

nodes.name: Create Not-Found Evidence
nodes.notes: Generates a definitive not_found EvidenceObject. WF-4 will route this straight to MANUAL_REVIEW.

nodes.name: Extract Evidence (Mistral)
nodes.notes: Temperature 0.0 for maximum determinism. Max tokens 800 — evidence object is small. System prompt enforces verbatim quoting and null-on-not-found.

nodes.name: Parse Evidence JSON
nodes.notes: Strips fences, isolates object, fixes trailing commas. Normalises string values to float. Clamps confidence. On any parse failure, returns not_found rather than crashing.

nodes.name: POST Evidence to FastAPI
nodes.notes: Posts one EvidenceObject per pair. FastAPI stores to evidence table. Sends back to Split In Batches to process next pair.

nodes.name: Back to Split In Batches
nodes.notes: NoOp connector — routes back into the Split In Batches loop. When Split In Batches has no more items, it routes to the 'done' output (index 1) which triggers the completion check.

nodes.name: Loop Complete
nodes.notes: Fires only when Split In Batches exhausts all pairs (done output). Assembles the completion payload to trigger WF-4.

nodes.name: Trigger WF-4 Verdict Engine
nodes.notes: Fires WF-4 webhook after all evidence is stored. n8n internal webhook call — use the same container hostname. WF-4 will fetch all evidence from FastAPI and run the verdict engine.
